channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Android & Flutter Resource Cleaner - Wed Jun 24 12:11:54 UTC 2026
item.description:
Detect unused drawables, strings, layouts, colors and Flutter assets in Android and Flutter projects. Shows potential storage savings. One-click cleanup.
vendor: Bodila Avesh Arifbhai downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.aveshbodila.resourcecleaner
